decks.notes: This Izzet Control deck focuses on removing opponents' threats and generating card advantage. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments and Boomerang Basics to control the board, along with draw spells like Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent, the deck aims to out value the opponent. The inclusion of powerful finishers like Combustion Technique and Iroh's Demonstration ensure that the deck can close out the game once it has gained control. The deck also utilizes powerful lands like Steam Vents and Spirebluff Canal to ensure smooth mana fixing and flexibility in casting spells.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board through a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage. It aims to outvalue and outlast opponents by using cards like Monument to Endurance and Riverpyre Verge for extra resources, while using Artist's Talent and Accumulate Wisdom to draw cards and maintain card advantage. With a suite of removal spells like Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique, along with counterspells like Spell Snare, the deck seeks to answer threats efficiently while developing its own board presence.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. The aim is to disrupt the opponent's plans while slowly building up resources and eventually overwhelming them with powerful spells and abilities. The deck utilizes a mix of burn spells, card draw, and efficient creatures to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent. By efficiently managing resources and making calculated decisions, the player can maintain control of the game and secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively attack the opponent using a combination of creatures and spells, while also providing some control elements to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck focuses on utilizing the various abilities of the cards to maintain board presence and push damage through quickly. With a mix of creatures with abilities and spell cards for removal and protection, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize their own board.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures with airbending abilities such as "Aang" and "Appa" along with support cards like "Airbender Ascension" and "Interdimensional Web Watch" to quickly build up a powerful combo. The key strategy is to establish a strong board presence early with mana ramp and defensive creatures before unleashing a game-ending combo. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like "Doc Aurlock, Grizzled Genius" and "Starting Town" provide card advantage and protection to ensure the success of the combo. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its synergistic interactions and powerful creatures.

This deck focuses on using a combination of spells and creatures to control the board and disrupt your opponent's game plan. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments and Boomerang Basics to remove threats, as well as cards like Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent to draw additional resources, you can maintain control of the game while setting up your win condition. Agna Qel'a and Monument to Endurance provide additional protection, while Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique offer powerful removal options. With a mix of spells and creatures, this deck aims to outlast and outsmart your opponent to secure victory.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of spells and abilities to manipulate the opponent's board and resources. It aims to disrupt their strategy while building up its own resources and card advantage. The deck includes a mix of removal spells, card draw, and versatile creatures to maintain control of the game tempo. Additionally, the inclusion of Monument to Endurance and Gran-Gran provides a solid late-game strategy to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures. The deck also utilizes Ral, Crackling Wit as a win condition and card advantage engine.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressively-statted creatures. By utilizing efficient mana ramp with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, the player can quickly deploy threats such as Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional power boosts, while Escape Tunnel allows for surprise attacks. Overall, the deck focuses on early aggression and efficient mana ramp to maintain pressure on the opponent.

The core idea of this deck is to control the tempo of the game using a combination of removal spells, card draw, and powerful creatures. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments and Boomerang Basics to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also generating card advantage with Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent. With powerful finishers like Agna Qel'a and Gran-Gran, as well as the ability to ramp up quickly with Monument to Endurance and Riverpyre Verge, this deck can quickly take control of the game and seal the victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the pace of the game by utilizing a combination of removal spells, card draw, and counter spells. The key strategy is to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent by efficiently using resources and disrupting their game plan. With cards like Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom for card advantage, Artist's Talent for removal, and Iroh's Demonstration for extra value, the deck aims to gradually wear down the opponent and secure victory. Utilizing versatile cards like Riverpyre Verge and Spirebluff Canal allows for flexibility in mana management and efficient spell casting.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive red creatures and direct damage spells. The deck aims to control the board early on using cheap burn spells like Burst Lightning and Lightning Strike, while also deploying creatures like Hired Claw and Hexing Squelcher to deal damage and apply pressure. Zhao, the Moon Slayer and Nova Hellkite provide high-powered threats to finish the game quickly, while cards like Tersa Lightshatter and Soulstone Sanctuary offer additional value and late-game reach. The deck's goal is to be fast and efficient in order to secure a victory before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient burn spells. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, you can deal damage to your opponent while keeping control of the board. The inclusion of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Secret Identity allows you to disrupt your opponent's strategy and push through for a quick victory. With a low mana curve and plenty of card draw, this deck is designed to be fast-paced and relentless in its pursuit of victory.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on using a mix of aggressive creatures like Cecil, Dark Knight and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, along with disruptive spells like Get Out and Strategic Betrayal to control the board and quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes versatile cards like Quantum Riddler and Stormchaser's Talent for additional card advantage and tempo swings. With a few removal options like Shoot the Sheriff and Restless Reef, this deck aims to apply constant pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining a strong board presence.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures and making use of aggressive tactics to overwhelm the opponent. Ba Sing Se and Badgermole Cub provide early game aggression, while Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer help boost the power of the creatures on the battlefield. Escape Tunnel provides protection and evasion, while Fabled Passage helps fix mana. The deck also includes some ramp with Llanowar Elves and Icetill Explorer. Overall, the goal is to ramp up quickly, play threats, and press the advantage to win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures while ramping up mana quickly with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage. Earthbender Ascension and Sapling Nursery provide early game board presence, while Ba Sing Se and Badgermole Cub offer strong mid-game threats. The deck also includes some control elements such as Esper Origins and Lumbering Worldwagon to handle opposing threats. The use of Escape Tunnel allows for strategic retreats or surprise attacks, while Archdruid's Charm provides additional versatility. Overall, the focus is on building a strong board presence and applying pressure early on.

This deck focuses on utilizing cheap spells and creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with damage. It features a mix of aggressive creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Elusive Otter, along with efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Stock Up to maintain tempo advantage. The inclusion of card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand helps ensure consistent draws to keep up the pressure. The deck also utilizes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off to disrupt the opponent's board state and allow for more direct damage.
